title: Formal Business Headshot Profile Poster AI
sourceTitle: Formal Business Headshot Profile Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Polished formal business headshot poster featuring fictional adult design professional in dark suit jacket and white shirt, calm confident direct eye contact. Subject: fictional adult design professional in dark suit jacket and white shirt, calm confident direct eye contact is the centered professional portrait subject, with clean facial contour, natural realistic skin detail, neat business hairstyle, formal attire, calm confident expression, and trustworthy presence. Scene: plain white studio background with lower information bar and professional conference speaker-card layout creates the clean corporate profile environment with plain white or soft gray-white background, professional lower information area, and minimal premium layout. Composition: Fixed square 1:1 corporate headshot poster composition: frontal half-body portrait, subject centered, direct eye contact, even white background, lower information bar, clean spacing, and professional ID-photo clarity. Signature Elements: Centered formal headshot, dark business attire, plain white studio background, lower name-and-title information bar, soft even lighting, minimal trustworthy corporate layout, and square profile poster finish. Style: Clean formal photorealistic business headshot poster with premium minimal corporate design, subtle retouching, realistic lighting, natural skin detail, professional hairstyle, dark suit styling, and trustworthy executive portrait finish. Color Palette: White or soft gray-white background, dark suit contrast, clean shirt tones, neutral skin realism, black or charcoal typography, and restrained corporate accent lines. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Frontal square portrait camera, centered half-body crop, direct calm eye contact, natural lens compression, and clean professional profile-card readability. Typography: Name: Yuna Koizumi; Senior Graphic Designer; International Design Institute supplies the swappable visible text elements detail for this template. Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
